description: As the title says this is the solution of the go game on a 6x6 board. You will have to play black optimally. This is based on a study involving a go program. It reveals a black win by 3 points without komi. I included all the correct path and tried to block all symetries, I also included some wrong path that are not trivially wrong. I will look at your try or request to add some other. There is an update date in the title.
sgf:
